texto: 216This comprehension of our own personal misery makes us equally understanding of the misery of others. How can one who is really convinced of his own frailty, weakness, and inconstancy, dare to condemn others?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Father Gabriel que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “216This comprehension of our own personal misery makes us equally understanding of the misery of …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, tolerance, misery, com foco em reflexao.
